name: arXiv cs.CL & cs.AI
description: The primary open-access archive for preprint publications in Computation & Language and Artificial Intelligence, serving as the first source of research breakthroughs.

name: OpenAI Announcements
description: Official model announcements, tech reports, and system performance updates directly from OpenAI, detailing context window sizes and retrieval models.

name: Anthropic News
description: Official publications, research papers, and API updates from Anthropic, detailing system prompts, tool use protocols, and model capabilities.

name: LangGraph Docs
description: Official technical guide and API reference for LangGraph, focusing on context orchestration via stateful multi-agent graphs.

name: LlamaIndex Docs
description: Documentation detailing RAG pipelines, context indexing, query engines, and metadata extraction techniques.

name: Andrej Karpathy
description: Prominent AI builder and educator, cofounder of OpenAI. Published the seminal 'LLM Knowledge Base/Wikis' concept.

name: Andrew Ng
description: Cofounder of Google Brain and Coursera, CEO of Landing AI, publisher of the widely read The Batch newsletter.

name: Harrison Chase
description: Cofounder and CEO of LangChain, sharing insights on agentic patterns, tool usage, and prompt assembly.

name: Jerry Liu
description: Cofounder and CEO of LlamaIndex, publishing techniques on structure-aware data grounding for LLM agents.

name: Arthur Mensch
description: Cofounder and CEO of Mistral AI, pushing innovations in long-context models, function calling, and structured outputs.

name: Sebastian Raschka
description: LLM researcher, author, and staff research engineer at Lightning AI. Writes highly technical breakdowns of AI papers.

name: Lilian Weng
description: AI research scientist and Head of Safety Systems at OpenAI. Famous for deep technical blog posts on agent architectures.

name: Nathan Lambert
description: Machine learning researcher focusing on RLHF, model evaluation, and newsletter author for Interconnects.

name: Percy Liang
description: Stanford Professor and Director of Center for Research on Foundation Models (CRFM), leading efforts on model benchmarks.

name: Logan Kilpatrick
description: Product Lead for Google AI Studio and Gemini API. Advocates for developer workflows, APIs, and model capabilities.

name: Hugging Face Blog
description: Community and staff technical articles detailing open-source models, training datasets, and inference implementations.

name: DeepLearning.AI
description: Leading educational platform and weekly newsletter ('The Batch') detailing practical applications of LLMs and agent systems.

name: TLDR AI
description: Highly curated daily newsletter summarizing major news, technical papers, and open-source tools in the AI ecosystem.

name: The Atlas
description: Popular AI engineering and business strategy publication on LinkedIn, analyzing corporate adoptions of AI agents.

name: AI Engineer Youtube
description: Community educational channel and conference platform highlighting keynotes and coding tools for AI engineering.

name: Yannic Kilcher
description: YouTube creator explaining ML papers in depth, highlighting mathematical formulas, architectures, and breakthroughs.

name: Two Minute Papers
description: Academically grounded visual explanations of cutting-edge research papers in artificial intelligence and simulation.

name: Context-Engineering Repo
description: A highly curated GitHub index mapping the concepts, design patterns, and emerging engineering techniques for context management.

name: Awesome Context Engineering
description: A community-led Awesome List repository indexing articles, research papers, framework libraries, and coding tools.
